title: ProgressionMilestonePayload
description: A team crossed a tech-tier milestone during a race attempt (ADR-10). Emitted by the milestone mapper, which derives these from the service's OWN outcome events (ActionCompleted/ResourceGathered — the envelope's causationId points at the source event, so every milestone is ledger-replayable) and dedupes per (attemptId, teamId, milestone): 'first' means first for that team within that attempt. The milestone set is fixed and small by design; growing it is a contract commit. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events; aggregate is the Attempt.

attemptId.description: The race attempt this milestone belongs to (= AttemptStarted's attemptId and the envelope aggregateId).

teamId.description: The team that crossed the milestone, from the attempt's roster. Free string — team names are attempt configuration, not contract vocabulary.

villagerId.description: The team member whose action crossed it.

milestone.description: The T1 ladder, in canonical order. iron_pickaxe is the race win condition: first team to a crafted (never looted) iron pickaxe — the mapper only fires it from ActionCompleted{action:craft}, which structurally excludes loot.

detail.description: Human-readable color for the race feed and captions (what was gathered/crafted, where).
